cannibalisation_rule: Do not blog on topics already covered by Phase 3C service x city deep pages. The deep pages ARE the definitive content for bodyguard-hire/{city}, security-drivers/{city}, executive-protection/{city}, residential-security/{city}. Blog articles on these topics should cover angles the deep pages do not: cost breakdowns, regulatory explainers, comparison pieces, question-led safety guides.
